title: How to Evaluate RAG Systems
iq: How would you measure whether your RAG system is working? / What metrics would you use to evaluate a retrieval-augmented chatbot?
kt: RAG evals split into retrieval quality (Precision@K, Recall@K, MRR) and generation quality (faithfulness, answer relevance). Faithfulness = does the answer stay grounded in retrieved docs. Relevance = does the answer address the actual question. Both must be high — high faithfulness + low relevance means grounded but off-topic.
cc:
Why RAG evals are different

Standard ML evals measure prediction accuracy. RAG evals measure two things independently: did you retrieve the right chunks, and did you generate a faithful answer from them. A system can fail at either step.
